title: stellaria tetrandra
intro: Stellaria tetrandra, also known as Four Leaf Gilia or Four-Leaf Sneezeweed, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia, particularly in China and Japan. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds, which are used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments, including colds and flu.
